title: Rinse and Empty Containers
description: Make sure all containers are empty and rinsed clean before placing them in the recycling bin. Contaminated materials can spoil entire batches.

title: Remove Labels & Caps
description: Remove any labels, stickers, and hard plastic caps from containers, as these often consist of different materials and interfere with recycling.

title: Separate Materials
description: Keep different types of recyclables separated—such as newspaper, oil filters, plastics, batteries, and scrap metal—to expedite processing.

title: Dispose Responsibly
description: Check localized community rules. Bulky metals, motor oils, cell batteries, and chemical containers must always be delivered to specialized hubs.
